originalTitle: No Peace Amongst the Stars | Warhammer 40,000 Official Cinematic Trailer
content: In the 41st Millennium, there is no peace amongst the stars – only an eternity of carnage and slaughter, and the laughter of thirsting gods. Forget the power of technology and science. Forget the promise of progress and understanding. In the grim darkness of the far future, there is only war. Pre-order the Warhammer 40,000: Armageddon new edition launch set on Saturday 6 June 2026, and buy it in stores on 20th June. Here's what you need to know: https://www.warhammer-community.com/en-gb/articles/b0ic7nin/new40k-new-cinematic-trailer-drops/ Like, share, and subscribe to see all the latest videos, news, and reveals from the 41st Millennium. chineseContent: 在第 41 个千年中，群星之间没有和平——只有永恒的屠杀和饥渴的众神的笑声。忘记技术和科学的力量。忘记进步和理解的承诺。在遥远未来的严酷黑暗中，只有战争。预订将于 2026 年 6 月 6 日星期六发售的《战锤 40,000：世界末日》新版本，并于 6 月 20 日在商店购买。以下是您需要了解的内容：https://www.warhammer-community.com/en-gb/articles/b0ic7nin/new40k-new-cinematic-trailer-drops/ 点赞、分享和订阅以查看 41 世纪的所有最新视频、新闻和揭秘。注册 Warhammer+：https://www.warhammerplus.com/ Warhammer 社区：https://www.warhammer-community.com/ Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/warhammer40000uk/ Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/warhammerofficial 在您的收件箱中获取 Warhammer： https://games-workshop.slgnt.eu/optiext/optiextension.dll?ID=PbkPioIi2OPuuZJNYIbPpPXeiNUE3YF eRk%2BgnKJ5zAj8YvRzzIHfFtC7TgGJCQRL3T2kUIo4g6QaHZRnvC&sg_lang=en&source=warhammer40000youtube
